_note: Ticker -> promoter/business group mapping for the entity-affinity learning layer (src/knowledge_graph/entity_affinity.py). Each group lists its major LISTED entities as project '.NS' tickers. Used to detect when a trading entity concentrates its bulk/block-deal activity in one group (an inferred, public-data-only affinity) and to read that entity's net direction (accumulating vs distributing). Tickers not listed fall into 'UNGROUPED' and still accumulate per-ticker, just without group-level rollup. `client_aliases` maps a normalized client-name variant to a canonical name where the rule-based canonicalizer under-merges (e.g. two spellings of the same fund). Edit freely, no code change needed. This is NOT investment advice or a claim of actual ownership links — it is a grouping heuristic over public disclosures.
